title: Lynn Aven
compiled_truth: Lynn Aven is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-10 to 2002-01-09), Lynn Aven sent 18 and received 222 emails, totalling 240 interactions. Top correspondents: [Brent Hendry](people/brent-hendry) (11), [Michael Guerriero](people/michael-guerriero) (6), [Andrea Calo](people/andrea-calo) (5), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (4), [Julian Poole](people/julian-poole) (4).
